name_en: M25445 Royal Blue Ostrich This Slim Trunk handbag draws inspiration from Louis Vuitton's traditional trunks, incorporating riveted borders and metal S-lock buckles into the ostrich leather, showcasing a rock-chic style. The glossy chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering various carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)
